quote: note="The relational noun or follows the host noun cise 'house'; the possessor ku= marks the host noun, not or itself. The case particle ta attaches to or in the 〈場所〉 slot."

suggestion: Rephrase to 'The case particle ta attaches to or, which occupies the 〈場所〉 slot.'

suggestion: Rephrase to 'The fused form 'otta' arises only with 'ta', not with 'peka' or 'un'.'
